description:
You are working as an MLOps engineer in charge of periodically archiving old
    model-checkpoint artifacts that are scattered throughout an experiments
    tree.  Each checkpoint file has the extension “.ckpt”.  The directory tree
    that already exists is shown below (all paths are absolute):

        /home/user/experiments/
            exp01/
                checkpoints/
                    model_epoch_1.ckpt
                    model_epoch_2.ckpt
                logs/
                    train.log
            exp02/
                checkpoints/
                    model_epoch_10.ckpt
            exp03/
                checkpoints/
                    best.ckpt

    Goal
    ----
    1. Locate **every** “*.ckpt” file anywhere under /home/user/experiments.
       (Do NOT rely on hard-coding the file names; use find.)
    2. Create a single gzipped tarball containing those *.ckpt files.  
       The archive must be created at
           /home/user/archived_checkpoints/ckpt_archive.tar.gz
       • The directory /home/user/archived_checkpoints does **not** exist yet
         and therefore has to be created first.  
       • Inside the archive, keep the paths *relative to /home/user/*  
         E.g. the entry for “/home/user/experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt”
         must appear in the tar as  
             experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt
    3. After the tarball is successfully written, delete the original “.ckpt”
       files from the filesystem, leaving the rest of the directory tree intact.
    4. Produce a manifest file
           /home/user/archived_checkpoints/ckpt_manifest.log
       that records what you archived.  The manifest must:
         • contain **one line per checkpoint file**,  
         • be sorted in lexicographical order by the relative path,  
         • have the exact format  
               <relative_path_from_/home/user> <file_size_in_bytes>
           For example:  
               experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt 19
         • end with a single trailing newline character.
    5. Verify (for yourself) that no “*.ckpt” files remain in
       /home/user/experiments once you are done.

    Constraints
    -----------
    • Accomplish the archive + delete steps using a combination of `find` and
      `xargs`.  Shell loops are allowed only for pre- or post-sanity checks,
      not for the core bulk-file operation.
    • You are a regular user; do not use sudo.
    • No paths outside /home/user may be touched.
    • The only files that must end up in
      /home/user/archived_checkpoints/ are:
          – ckpt_archive.tar.gz
          – ckpt_manifest.log

    What the automated grader will check
    ------------------------------------
    1.  /home/user/archived_checkpoints exists and is a directory.
    2.  /home/user/archived_checkpoints/ckpt_archive.tar.gz exists and is a
        valid gzip-compressed tar archive whose *members* are exactly:
            experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt
            experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_2.ckpt
            experiments/exp02/checkpoints/model_epoch_10.ckpt
            experiments/exp03/checkpoints/best.ckpt
    3.  The archive members’ byte contents match what was on disk prior to
        deletion.
    4.  The original four “*.ckpt” files no longer exist on the filesystem.
    5.  /home/user/archived_checkpoints/ckpt_manifest.log exists and its
        entire content is (including the final newline):

            experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt 19
            experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_2.ckpt 19
            experiments/exp02/checkpoints/model_epoch_10.ckpt 20
            experiments/exp03/checkpoints/best.ckpt 21

    Use any intermediate commands you like, but make sure the above observable
    end-state is achieved.  Displaying helpful console output is fine, but only
    the two files in /home/user/archived_checkpoints and the absence of *.ckpt
    files will be graded.
truth:
<!--
        Pre-existing filesystem before the agent starts
    -->
    <preexisting>
        <file path="/home/user/experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt"
              bytes="dummy checkpoint 1\n"/>
        <file path="/home/user/experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_2.ckpt"
              bytes="dummy checkpoint 2\n"/>
        <file path="/home/user/experiments/exp01/logs/train.log"
              bytes="(content irrelevant)"/>
        <file path="/home/user/experiments/exp02/checkpoints/model_epoch_10.ckpt"
              bytes="dummy checkpoint 10\n"/>
        <file path="/home/user/experiments/exp03/checkpoints/best.ckpt"
              bytes="best checkpoint data\n"/>
    </preexisting>

    <!-- Final state expected by the grader -->
    <final_state>
        <directory path="/home/user/archived_checkpoints"/>
        <file path="/home/user/archived_checkpoints/ckpt_archive.tar.gz">
            <!-- This tar.gz must contain exactly the four member paths listed. -->
            <members>
                <member name="experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt"
                        size="19"/>
                <member name="experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_2.ckpt"
                        size="19"/>
                <member name="experiments/exp02/checkpoints/model_epoch_10.ckpt"
                        size="20"/>
                <member name="experiments/exp03/checkpoints/best.ckpt"
                        size="21"/>
            </members>
        </file>
        <file path="/home/user/archived_checkpoints/ckpt_manifest.log"
              bytes="experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt 19\nexperiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_2.ckpt 19\nexperiments/exp02/checkpoints/model_epoch_10.ckpt 20\nexperiments/exp03/checkpoints/best.ckpt 21\n"/>
        <!-- The original ckpt files must be gone -->
        <absent path="/home/user/experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_1.ckpt"/>
        <absent path="/home/user/experiments/exp01/checkpoints/model_epoch_2.ckpt"/>
        <absent path="/home/user/experiments/exp02/checkpoints/model_epoch_10.ckpt"/>
        <absent path="/home/user/experiments/exp03/checkpoints/best.ckpt"/>
    </final_state>
